== Notes for [[Item:Q80228|Q80228]] ==

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=updike&id=I58103

•ID: I58103

•Name: Mariana MINOR

•Sex: F

•Birth: ABT 180

Father: Caius Julius MARIUS b: ABT 155

Mother: Pedania Pedanius FUSCUS b: ABT 157

Marriage 1 Commodus POMPEIANUS b: ABT 175

Children

1. Aurelia POMPEIANA b: ABT 209 in Rome, Italy

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
